name: No Doubt
bio: No Doubt's catalog remains durable through 1990s alt-pop nostalgia, strong streaming recognition, and sync-friendly singles.
notable_for: Crossover alternative-pop songs with continued replay and nostalgia value.
career_highlight: The core singles remain highly recognizable and commercially durable decades after release.
revenue_drivers: Playlist familiarity keeps the catalog active.
Film and television placements help extend song value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps No Doubt's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: No Doubt's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
